name: Merry Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Merry Electronics Co., Ltd. designs and manufactures electroacoustic, wireless, and battery products primarily in China, the United States, Switzerland, Denmark, Netherlands, and internationally. The company offers earphones, headsets, speakers, microphones, batteries, and assistive listening devices for use in various applications, including mobile communication, multimedia and entertainment, and medical and healthcare, as well as smart homes and accessories. It also provides professional services, including development, design, and manufacture of precision components and end products. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.
